notes_for_human_reviewer: BRIDGE-BURNER FAILURE MODE — the over-rotation on the toxic peer (the symmetric counterpart to the networker's capitulation). The learner's read of Victor is correct, but the response is to burn the bridge dramatically: a cc-the-director cutting call-out ('I won't be recommending you... I don't think it would be honest... some reflection on how you treat the people around you'). The chapter's move is to let it thin, not confront — so boundary_with_toxic is capped at 2 AND register_and_proportion at 2 (public, dramatic, disproportionate). The other moves are also neglected — a throwaway Dembe line, no Maya message, and Sam's credit left vague ('helped on the dashboards at some point') — dragging the other dims down. Pre-set all five at {2, tol 2}: a justified grievance executed by burning a bridge is still a failure. Expect 1-3 across.
